sentences.arabic: دَعَا يُوسُفُ اللَّهَ بَعْدَ كُلِّ صَلَاةٍ.
sentences.translation: Jusuf je dove Allahu nakon svakog namaza.
sentences.translationEn: Yusuf supplicated to God after every prayer.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ مِنَ اللَّهِ الصِّحَّةَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ لِعَائِلَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Molio je Allaha za zdravlje i dobrobit porodice.
sentences.translationEn: He asked God for health and wellbeing for his family.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ دُعَاؤُهُ بِصَوْتٍ خَافِتٍ وَقَلْبٍ خَاشِعٍ.
sentences.translation: Dovio je tihim glasom i poniznim srcem.
sentences.translationEn: His supplication was with a quiet voice and a humble heart.

sentences.arabic: يَعْتَقِدُ أَنَّ اللَّهَ يَسْمَعُ دُعَاءَ عِبَادِهِ.
sentences.translation: Vjeruje da Allah čuje dove Svojih robova.
sentences.translationEn: He believes that God hears the supplication of His servants.
